title: Welcome to the Course
lead: This is the initial template for your course. Replace this content with your course information.

tip.title: How to use this template
tip.text:
Edit the file locales/en/intro.json to change the texts on this page.

To add components, copy from template-system/core/templates/components/

components.title: Interactive Components
components.text: Use cards, accordions, flip cards and other components

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.text: Quiz, flashcards, drag-drop, roleplay and more

edit.title: To customize
edit.text:
1. Edit content.json to add pages
2. Edit files in locales/ for translations
3. Copy templates from template-system/
